result.stderr:
Discord.Net.Tools.Localization.Resx 1.2.1
Copyright (C) 2026 Discord.Net.Tools.Localization.Resx

  -g, --guild        Guild to fetch the commands from. Fetches global commnands
                     if no guild is specified.

  -o, --output       Output directory.

  -f, --file         Name of the output file.

  -t, --token        Required. Token of the bot. (Argument mutually exclusive
                     with TokenPath)

  -T, --tokenPath    Required. Path of the .txt file that contains the bot
                     token. (Argument mutually exclusive with Token)

  -s, --skipEmpty    Empty or null string values are excluded from the final
                     localization file. Such as description fields of Context
                     Commands.

  --help             Display this help screen.

  --version          Display version information.

options.description: Token of the bot. (Argument mutually exclusive with TokenPath)
Path of the .txt file that contains the bot token. (Argument mutually exclusive with Token)
Guild to fetch the commands from. Fetches global commnands if no guild is specified.
Empty or null string values are excluded from the final localization file. Such as description fields of Context Commands.
